task_updates.executor_notes: useEffectRegistry now uses useSyncExternalStore for reactive re-renders, installs the singleton via useLayoutEffect, and registers drafts -> DB -> resource effects sequentially inside registry.batch(), with a legacy DB deprecation warning and resource schemas forwarded into the registry. Verified with the full DynamicEffectRegistry, VideoEditorProvider, and useEffectResources test modules plus `npx tsc --noEmit`.

wrapWithClipEffects now captures pre-wrap fallbacks, validates params from registry schemas at apply-time, and guards continuous/entrance/exit effect execution with EffectErrorBoundary while preserving the existing continuous-vs-transition prop contracts. Verified with the full DynamicEffectRegistry, VideoEditorProvider, and useEffectResources test modules plus `npx tsc --noEmit`.

EffectLayerSequence now validates continuous-effect params from the registry schema and wraps the effect render in EffectErrorBoundary with a fragment fallback so the child clip still renders if the effect crashes. Verified with the full DynamicEffectRegistry, VideoEditorProvider, and useEffectResources test modules plus `npx tsc --noEmit`.

EffectCreatorPanel preview composition now routes through a local wrapPreviewEffect helper, applies the same prop-shape rules as timeline rendering, and falls back through EffectErrorBoundary while keeping PREVIEW_FPS hardcoded at 30. Verified with the full DynamicEffectRegistry, VideoEditorProvider, and useEffectResources test modules plus `npx tsc --noEmit`.

DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx now covers subscribe/getSnapshot reactivity, dedup suppression, batched notifications, schema retrieval, EffectErrorBoundary fallback rendering, and validateAndCoerceParams coercion. The expanded test file and the related provider/resource modules all passed, and `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified replaceEffectRegistry() now runs in useLayoutEffect, useSyncExternalStore subscribes to the registry snapshot, and registration order inside registry.batch() is drafts -> DB -> resources.

Verified wrapWithClipEffects still omits effectFrames for continuous effects, preserves secondsToFrames(duration, fps) for entrance/exit, and uses clip.continuous.type / clip.entrance.type / clip.exit.type for each boundary.
Verified EffectLayerSequence still passes effectFrames={durationInFrames} and falls back to <>{children}</> if the continuous effect throws.

Verified wrapPreviewEffect mirrors the timeline prop shapes: continuous gets effectFrames=durationInFrames, entrance/exit get effectFrames from effect seconds, and PREVIEW_FPS remains hardcoded at 30.

Verified the expanded DynamicEffectRegistry test module covers reactivity, dedup, batching, getSchema, error-boundary fallback rendering, and param coercion, and the existing two tests still pass within the full file run.
